name: shorevest-website
description: Static website for ShoreVest Partners, including English and Chinese pages, the investor portal, insights, media pages, legal notices, brand assets, and PDF publications.

scripts.check:recruitment: node --check assets/js/recruitment-role-list.js && node --check assets/js/recruitment-role-detail.js && node --check scripts/validate-recruitment-roles.js && node --check api/recruitment/core/constants.js && node --check api/recruitment/core/stateMachines.js && node --check api/recruitment/core/fileTypes.js && node --check api/recruitment/core/validation.js && node --check api/recruitment/core/flows.js && node --check api/recruitment/core/inMemoryAdapters.js
scripts.test:recruitment: node tests/recruitment-roles.test.js && node tests/recruitment-role-list.test.js && node tests/recruitment-role-detail.test.js && node tests/recruitment-static-security.test.js && node tests/recruitment-application-core.test.js && node tests/recruitment-phase2a2.test.js && node tests/recruitment-phase2a3.test.js
scripts.check:functions: cd services/recruitment-functions && npm run check && npm run validate:manifest && npm run validate:sharepoint
scripts.bicep:build:recruitment: az bicep build --file infra/recruitment/main.bicep && az bicep build --file infra/recruitment/event-grid-subscription.bicep && az bicep build --file infra/recruitment/hr-auth.bicep && az bicep build --file infra/recruitment/runtime-settings.v2.bicep && az bicep build --file infra/recruitment/lifecycle.bicep && az bicep build --file infra/recruitment/monitoring-rules.v4.bicep
scripts.bicep:lint:recruitment: az bicep build --file infra/recruitment/main.bicep --stdout >/dev/null && az bicep build --file infra/recruitment/event-grid-subscription.bicep --stdout >/dev/null && az bicep build --file infra/recruitment/hr-auth.bicep --stdout >/dev/null && az bicep build --file infra/recruitment/runtime-settings.v2.bicep --stdout >/dev/null && az bicep build --file infra/recruitment/lifecycle.bicep --stdout >/dev/null && az bicep build --file infra/recruitment/monitoring-rules.v4.bicep --stdout >/dev/null
